findings.title: Data residency
findings.detail: PHI-like cohort processing stays in a single Azure region with geo-redundant storage disabled for primary patient indexes.

findings.title: Private connectivity
findings.detail: Ingestion APIs reach workflow workers only through private endpoints; no public ingress on data-plane NICs.

findings.title: Audit trail
findings.detail: Azure Monitor diagnostic settings stream security logging to a locked-down Log Analytics workspace with retention aligned to policy.

findings.title: Third-party SAAS
findings.detail: One vendor integration still uses username-password vault entries; roadmap cites OAuth but not timeline.
